layoutRegions.name: hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize emergency secret lease rotation state and expose the packet sealing action.

layoutRegions.name: rotation-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare emergency lease rotations by owner, stale caches, dependent services, status, and progress.

layoutRegions.name: rotation-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect failed revocations, dependent services, cleanup receipts, owner attestations, timeline events, and rollback-safe packets.

components.name: MetricCard
components.purpose: Show lease rotation totals and risk tone with stable dimensions.

components.name: RotationCard
components.purpose: Show a secret lease rotation with owner, state, cache purge state, dependent services, and progress.
interactions: status chip stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense rows for failed revocations, dependent services, timeline events, and rotation packet fields.
interactions: row layout stacks at mobile widths
status labels remain visible without layout shift

components.name: SealRotationButton
components.purpose: Primary action for sealing a rollback-safe rotation packet.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states use accent tokens

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
